bhāgineya or bhāgine˚yaka, m. (fr. bhaginī) a sister's son,  PārGṛ. ;  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c. (also in friendly address to any younger person,  Divyāv. );
(˚yī), f. a sister's daughter,  MW.
